steps.title: Find the shared feature
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between the two sculptures. The notes say Recognition shows figures reaching out to symbolize a supportive relationship, and Students Aspire shows figures embracing to symbolize support in pursuing equality.

steps.title: Reject one-sided details
steps.content:
• Choice A: It discusses only Students Aspire, so it does not compare both sculptures.
  • Choice C: The dates do not emphasize a similarity in the sculptures' content.
  • Choice D: It contrasts different facial features instead of emphasizing the shared supportive symbolism.
The answer is B.
